info.name: WebSphere Application Server Admin REST API
info.description:
REST API for administrative operations on IBM WebSphere Application Server including deployment, configuration, monitoring, and server management. Starting with version 9.0.0.1, Swagger documentation can be discovered and exposed for deployed RESTful endpoints.

Contact Support:
 Name: IBM Support
